source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

1.description: Pat slams Bloons into the ground.

3.description: Rallying Roar: All nearby Monkeys can pop +1 layer for a short time.

5.description: Sometimes does a powerful slap that pushes Bloons away from the exit.

6.description: Bloons struck by Pat are stunned for a short time.

7.description: Pat has increased pierce and deals more damage.

9.description: Increased attack range, and Rallying Roar further increases damage of rallied Monkeys.

10.description: Big Squeeze: Grabs a MOAB, BFB, DDT (if visible), or ZOMG and crushes it to bits over 5 seconds.

13.description: Attack stuns Bloons for longer and can stun MOAB-Class Bloons very briefly.

14.description: Rallying Roar increased duration and increased damage of rallied monkeys.

15.description: Slam and Slap attacks can hit more Bloons.

16.description: Pat deals much more damage to Ceramic Bloons.

20.description: Big Squeeze can hug several big Bloons at once, with such intensity nearby Bloons are left stunned!
